governance_results: Amendment adopted: emergency powers expire after 5 years automatically (ratio 83%)

diary_entries.entry: Another year. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
Population: 24. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. I spent the year on hydroponics. Closest to Cosmo-29.
The dust_storm changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 42): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
